title: verilator does not produce waveform/vcd for an unpacked array with >32 elements
body:
---


Author Name: **Alex Solomatnikov**
Original Redmine Issue: 384 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2011-09-02
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

If there 2 unpacked arrays, one with 32 elements, the other with 33:

```
addr_t a_addr[33-1:0];
addr_t d_addr[32-1:0];

```

then verilator does generate waveform info in vcd file for d_addr but not for a_addr.
